title: Automated Cadmies Integration
definition: The process of automating the transfer of concepts from external knowledge management systems (e.g., Obsidian) to the CADMIES concept repository.

difficulty_levels.beginner: A way to automatically move ideas and concepts stored in Obsidian into the CADMIES concept repository, avoiding manual copying.
difficulty_levels.intermediate: A technique for integrating external knowledge management systems with the CADMIES system, ensuring consistency and ease of use.
difficulty_levels.expert: An approach to automating the transfer of digital knowledge assets between various platforms, reducing human error and increasing efficiency in concept management.

extra_fields.insight: The ability to seamlessly integrate external knowledge repositories with CADMIES, enabling a more cohesive and efficient knowledge management system.
